scripts.prebuild: npx tsx scripts/check-no-tier-logic.ts && npx tsx scripts/detect-pii-write.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-migrations-schema-guard.ts && node scripts/verify-route-contract.js
scripts.check:security: pnpm check:supabase && pnpm check:rls && pnpm check:api
scripts.check:data: node ../scripts/checkForbiddenPatterns.ts && node ../scripts/checkPhase0Lockdown.mjs && node scripts/checkNoServerTextColumns.mjs && pnpm check:supabase && pnpm test -- --run test/api/migrationAuditNoText.test.ts && eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx
scripts.hardening:gate: npx tsx scripts/check-no-tier-logic.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-service-role-usage.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-migrations-schema-guard.ts && npx tsx scripts/detect-pii-write.ts && npx vitest run test/plans/failClosed.test.ts
scripts.seal:verify: npx tsx scripts/detect-pii-write.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-migrations-schema-guard.ts && echo 'System Seal Verified'
